name: Northern Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beef (flank, rump, sirloin), sliced into 1/2 by 2-inch strips
2 cups Chinese chard (bok choy), cut into 1 1/2 inch squares
1 small Onion, halved and cut into 1 1/2 inch squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add beef strips and sauté until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
3. Remove beef from skillet and set aside.
4. In the same skillet, add more oil if needed, then add onion squares, garlic, and ginger.
5. Sauté onions until softened, about 2-3 minutes.
6. Add beef back to the skillet with the vegetables.
7. Reduce heat to medium-low and continue cooking until beef is fully cooked through, about 10-15 minutes.
8. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if desired.
9. Serve hot over rice or noodles.
